Support frame should be provided, compatible with the provided backdrop.
Support frame size: 230cm (H) x 305cm (W) x 27cm (D).
The background should be able to stand independently.
Provide enough sandbags to secure the base of the backdrop.
check grammar: For the backdrop design, the final production should follow the user-designed template. The reference template given in Appendix I.
For the backdrop design, the final production should adhere to the user-designed template provided in Appendix I as a reference.
check grammar: For the backdrop printing, the final production should follow the user-designed template.
For the backdrop printing, the final production should adhere to the user-designed template.
check grammar: For the backdrop production, the final production should follow the user-designed template.
For the production of the backdrop, the final product should follow the user-designed template.
please help to revise the text to be better version: the price was remain unchanged
please help to revise the text to be noun: The price remained unchanged.
There was no change in the price.

check grammar:  By comparing with the previous purchase record of HAHO in Aug 2023 (PO#8110112390),the price remained unchanged is observed. Both programs are scheduled for two days and are related to the theme “Influence Others.

By comparing with the previous purchase record of HAHO in August 2023 (PO#8110112390), it is observed that there was no change in the price. Both programs are scheduled for two days and are related to the theme "Influence Others".

check grammar: By comparing with the previous purchase record of HAHO in Aug 2023 (PO#8110112390), an price of remained unchange is observed. Both programs are scheduled for two days and are related to the theme “Influence Others.”

By comparing with the previous purchase record of HAHO in August 2023 (PO#8110112390), it is observed that the price remained unchanged. Both programs are scheduled for two days and are related to the theme "Influence Others."
check grammar: Rental the router with Wi-Fi and Firewall features during the contract period
Rent the router with Wi-Fi and Firewall features during the contract period.
